Off Calendar Jul-17-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Daniel J. Friedman; Loeb & Loeb LLP; 415-903-3200; appearing as counsel for plaintiff Robert L. Duffy.
Emily L. Brough; Zacks & Freedman, PC; 415-956-8100; appearing as counsel for defendant and cross-complainant Martim De Arantes Oliveira.

Mr. Friedman contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AND CROSS-DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF DEFENDANT'S CROSS-COMPLAINT is DENIED.

DEFENDANT MARTIM OLIVEIRA Defendants Re Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp 128.7 is DENIED. The first amended complaint was not filed for an improper purpose and is not indisputably without merit. (Code Civ. Proc.,128.7.) The Court cannot resolve disputed factual issues at this time.
